Vocabulary - भूतस्य घण्टा | Story 22

28 May 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
एकदा once upon a time / once
अन्तः inside
आहारान्वेषणं { आहार अन्वेषण } seeking food
ग्रामस्थ villager
आनेतुम् to fetch
भीत afraid
अतीत passed / gone by
प्रत्यागत returned
अपेक्षित required / wished

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
सः सकृत् भीतः अभवत् He was/felt suddenly afraid.
उन्नयनीभ्यः मम शुनकः भीतः My dog is afraid of elevators.
समुन्नतस्थानेभ्यः भीतः अहम् I’m afraid of heights.
   
सा गृहं शीघ्रं प्रत्यागतवती She went back home at once.
यदा सा विद्यालयतः गृहं प्रत्यागतवती तदा सा सम्यक् न आसीत् When she came home from school she really didn’t look well.
मम विमानस्य गमनस्य निरसनं जातम् | अतः अहं गृहं प्रत्यागतवती My flight was cancelled so I came back home.
   
कः अपेक्षितः? Who do you want?
कति अपेक्षितानि? How many do you want?

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
